pollIntervalHelp: 两次 BLUETTI 遥测轮询之间的最短时间。首个实现保持只读。
oauthClientIdHelp: BLUETTI OAuth client ID. Store it in the adapter config before authenticating.
oauthClientSecretHelp: BLUETTI OAuth client secret. It is stored encrypted/protected by ioBroker.
deviceSelectionHelp: Select the device to poll. Requires prior authentication.
